raw_consumer_statement: XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX on XXXX, I received text and email notifications of questionable charges for {$410.00} at a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX from Citi . I logged into account and responded that charges were not authorized, and immediately cancelled the card number ( they issued a new number ). On XXXX a second charge for a XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, PA for XXXX showed up in pending. I notified Citi that this charge ( against a cancelled card ) was also fraudulent. Both remained in pending until this week when they were posted to my account. New card is in process but I am using new account number for my own legitimate charges. Spoke to Citi again today to inquire why the fraudulent charges were posted, they say they have 90 days to resolve and will not remove the charges until they receive credit from the hotels. These charges in excess of $ XXXX are now accruing interest, which they say they will credit if and when the fraud case is " resolved '' and they receive their money back.
